name: agent-citadel
description: Wizualizacja sesji Claude Code jako gra RTS w pixel-arcie

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/client"
scripts.demo: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/server -- --demo" "npm run dev -w @agent-citadel/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-citadel/shared && npm run build -w @agent-citadel/server && npm run build -w @agent-citadel/client
